identity.mission: Create a learning platform that feels like an intellectual adventure, not a spreadsheet.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix University Tradition (Serif) with Cyber-Future (Neon/Mono).
Emotion First: Marketing = Aspiration/Mystery; LMS = Clarity/Focus.
Content is King: Every scroll tells a story of growth.
Negative Space: Value the empty areas, especially in the dashboard.
Contrast: High contrast in Marketing, subtle separation in LMS.

brand_core.name: UniLearnHub
brand_core.emotional_tone: The prestige of Oxford meets the speed of Silicon Valley.

headings.usage: Marketing Headings, Hero Sections, Feature Titles
headings.notes: Use for emotional impact. Do not use for UI labels.

body.usage: UI Elements, Dashboard Data, Body Text, Code Snippets
body.notes: Creates a technical, precise feel. Increases legibility for data.

lms_headings.notes: Clean geometric sans for the dashboard to reduce cognitive load.

button.classes: rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg font-mono transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

card.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

button.classes: rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

card.classes: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6

navigation.classes: w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white h-screen fixed left-0 top-0

textures: Grid pattern (mask-image) for dashboard empty states

image_urls.description: Modern university architecture with stairs, upward angle. Use for Hero section with parallax.
Students studying in a large library. Use for 'Community' feature section.
Professor engaging with diverse students. Use for 'Expert Mentorship' section.
Abstract neural network illustration. Use for 'AI-Powered Insights' section.
Happy student raising hand in orange sweater. Use for Success Stories/Testimonials.

icons.library: phosphor-icons (Light weight for marketing, Regular for LMS)

libraries: lenis (Smooth scroll - MANDATORY for marketing page)

rules: Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-offset-2).

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building two distinct experiences: A Cinematic Marketing Page and a Functional LMS Dashboard. Do not mix the styles. Marketing is Dark/Neon. LMS is Light/Clean.
setup: Install dependencies: yarn add framer-motion @phosphor-icons/react clsx tailwind-merge lenis
Ensure tailwind.config.js extends the colors defined above.
marketing_page: Use 'Playfair Display' for all H1-H3 headings.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for small labels and buttons.
Create a sticky navigation that changes style when scrolling (Transparent -> Glass).
Use the 'Tetris Grid' for the features section.
lms_dashboard: Use 'Instrument Sans' or default sans for headings.
Sidebar navigation should be fixed on the left.
Use the 'Bento Grid' for the main overview.
Cards should be white with subtle borders, no heavy shadows.
Use the chart colors defined for progress bars and graphs.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic 'SaaS Blue' gradients.
Do not center align everything. Use asymmetry.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
Never use 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic content related to education.
Add hover states to EVERYTHING interactive.
